Name: WebMinds Designs
Project Summary: Webminds Designs is built on the intersection of strategic thinking and technical precision. As Creative Director, I led a digital transformation that fused premium graphic design with high-performance web development, ensuring their online presence matched the sophistication of their consultancy.
Project Summary 2: We engineered a modular design system that prioritizes both aesthetics and technical scalability. By balancing clean typography with optimized front-end architecture, we minimized site load times while maximizing visual impact, creating a seamless user journey that guides visitors through complex service offerings.
Project Summary 3: The new Webminds platform serves as the ultimate conversion engine for their high-ticket clients. By unifying their visual storytelling with a robust web structure, we deepened engagement and established a digital authority that reflects their position at the forefront of the design industry.
Lasting Impact: This project wasn’t just about a new look—it was about building a high-performance asset that delivers measurable growth. From the initial conceptual wireframes to the final deployment, we built a digital home that scales with their ambition.
Purposeful Wrap-Up: My creative leadership with Webminds Designs delivered more than just a website; it established a comprehensive digital identity that bridges the gap between premium design and technical excellence.

Name: Janet Sri Lanka
Project Summary: Janet Sri Lanka represents a heritage of natural beauty, and my goal was to translate that botanical essence into a dynamic digital experience. Through fluid motion graphics and a refined visual palette, we transformed traditional brand values into a contemporary narrative that breathes life into their product line.
Project Summary 2: I developed a comprehensive motion design system focused on "organic flow," mimicking the natural ingredients found in Janet products. By utilizing advanced 2D and 3D animation techniques, we reduced visual clutter and enhanced product storytelling, ensuring that every transition felt as smooth as the skincare it represents.
Project Summary 3: The reimagined visual identity for Janet Sri Lanka serves as a powerful engagement tool. By integrating motion-first storytelling, we increased time-on-page and successfully bridged the gap between heritage skincare and a younger, digitally-native audience.
Lasting Impact: This project went beyond simple aesthetics; it was about creating a visual language that communicates trust and nature through movement. From initial storyboard to final render, we built a sensory-rich digital world.
Purposeful Wrap-Up: Our collaboration with Janet Sri Lanka delivered more than just visuals; it established a motion-driven foundation that reflects their botanical expertise and paves the way for future digital expansion.

Name: Crepe Runner x Snack Entity
Project Summary: This portfolio piece highlights my work with two of the most recognizable names in the modern Sri Lankan food scene: Crepe Runner and Snack Entity. To capture their unique market positions, I developed high-energy visual identities that fuse street-style vibrancy with premium retail aesthetics, redefining how local food brands engage with a digital-first audience.
Project Summary 2: As Senior Graphic Designer, I engineered a comprehensive branding ecosystem across both labels, focusing on "visual appetite appeal" and retail-ready packaging. By balancing bold typography with optimized layouts for both physical menus and digital platforms, we ensured consistent brand recognition that stands out in high-traffic environments and crowded retail aisles.
Project Summary 3: The design systems for Crepe Runner and Snack Entity play a central role in their aggressive growth strategies. By unifying their visual storytelling—from social media motion posters to large-scale environmental graphics—we successfully deepened customer engagement and supported their transition into high-end retail contenders.
Lasting Impact: This project wasn’t just about making food look good; it was about building scalable brand assets that drive foot traffic and shelf conversion. From strategy to execution, we created a sensory-rich digital and physical presence that communicates quality at first glance.
Purposeful Wrap-Up: My design leadership for these industry leaders delivered more than just a menu or a package; it established a bold visual foundation that reflects their ambition to dominate the regional F&B market.

Name: & Some More

Purposeful Wrap-Up: My ongoing creative exploration across these diverse disciplines has delivered more than just a collection of assets; it has established a digital foundation of skill and variety that allows me to tackle any creative challenge with confidence.

Name: Harry's Queue
Project Summary: Harrys Queue is a brand built on the art of human aesthetics and the power of first impressions. To capture the elite spirit of the agency, I developed a visual language that fuses high-fashion minimalism with cutting-edge digital artistry, ensuring every model’s portfolio reflects a world-class standard.
Project Summary 2: I engineered a premium retouching workflow designed to enhance natural beauty while maintaining high-end editorial authenticity. By integrating sophisticated color grading and skin-texture preservation, we ensured that every social media creative and agency composite met the rigorous visual demands of the international modeling industry.
Project Summary 3: The social media strategy for Harrys Queue plays a central role in their talent discovery and client acquisition. Through high-impact layouts and motion-driven storytelling, we deepened engagement with global fashion brands while establishing a digital foundation that reflects their high-fashion vision.
Lasting Impact: This project wasn’t just about retouching—it was about creating a visual identity that commands attention in a competitive industry. From initial curation to final digital execution, we built a portfolio of assets that represent the gold standard of professional modeling.
Purposeful Wrap-Up: My design leadership with Harrys Queue delivered more than just social media posts; it established a premium visual aesthetic that reflects their commitment to excellence and high-fashion storytelling.

Name: LuvEsence VR
Project Summary: LuvEscence VR was an experiment in sensory immersion and psychological presence. As Creative Designer and VR Developer, I envisioned a space that pushed the boundaries of traditional interaction, creating a "Plank" experience that forces users to confront their sense of balance and vertigo in a hyper-realistic virtual environment.
Project Summary 2: I architected the VR system from the ground up, utilizing Unity’s physics engine to ensure the "Plank" felt physically responsive—mimicking the exact weight distribution, subtle sway, and tension of a real-world structure. By integrating high-fidelity ambient audio and depth-perception triggers, we transformed simple gameplay into a visceral, adrenaline-inducing test of human coordination.
Project Summary 3: The LuvEscence VR project serves as a masterclass in immersive design. It bridged the gap between raw technical execution and narrative-driven environment design, effectively demonstrating how spatial computing can alter perception and decision-making in a controlled digital space.
Lasting Impact: This project was about proving that immersion is more than just visuals; it’s about the physiological reaction of the user. From the initial 3D modeling to the final physics calibration, we built a digital experience that remains etched in the memory of everyone who steps onto that plank.
Purposeful Wrap-Up: My leadership on LuvEscence VR delivered more than just a simulation; it established a new standard for how I approach human-computer interaction, proving that technical precision and creative storytelling are the two pillars of true digital presence.
